title: Verify password field validation for less than 8 characters
description: Test that the password field shows a validation error if the password entered is less than 8 characters long.
preconditions: User is on the login page

steps.description: 2. Enter 'pass123' (7 characters) into the password field

expected_result: A validation error message 'Password must be at least 8 characters' is displayed for the password field. User remains on the login page.
